name: Strawberry Angel Fluff
recipeInstructions:
1 Tear the angel food cake into walnut-size pieces and scatter over the bottom of a 10-inch X 13-inch sheet cake pan.
2 Dissolve the Strawberry Jello in 2 cups boiling water, then stir in 2 cups cold water. Allow to jell slightly.
3 Gently fold in the thawed frozen strawberries and whipped topping into the jello mixture.
4 Pour over the torn angel food cake pieces.
5 Refrigerate until set.
6 Decorate with whipped cream or additional whipped topping and fresh strawberries before serving.
